data.output:
schema: schema.graphql
operations:
  - queries/*.graphql
generated: generated.go
package: axon
bindings:
  DateTime:
    type: time.Time
  JSON:
    type: map[string]interface{}

---
schema {
  query: Query
  mutation: Mutation
  subscription: Subscription
}

scalar JSON
scalar DateTime

type Query {
  ddxBead(id: ID!): Bead
  ddxBeads: [Bead!]!
}

type Mutation {
  createEntity(input: BeadInput!): Bead!
  updateEntity(id: ID!, expectedVersion: Int!, input: BeadInput!): Bead!
}

type Subscription {
  changeEvents(projectID: ID!): ChangeEvent!
}

type Bead {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  status: String!
  priority: Int!
  issueType: String!
  owner: String
  createdAt: DateTime
  createdBy: String
  updatedAt: DateTime
  labels: [String!]!
  parent: ID
  description: String
  acceptance: String
  notes: String
  dependencies: [Dependency!]!
  extra: JSON
}

type Dependency {
  issueID: ID!
  dependsOnID: ID!
  type: String!
  createdAt: String
  createdBy: String
  metadata: String
}

type ChangeEvent {
  eventID: ID!
  beadID: ID!
  kind: String!
  summary: String!
  body: String!
  actor: String!
  timestamp: DateTime!
}

input BeadInput {
  id: ID
  title: String!
  status: String!
  priority: Int!
  issueType: String!
  owner: String
  createdAt: DateTime
  createdBy: String
  updatedAt: DateTime
  labels: [String!]!
  parent: ID
  description: String
  acceptance: String
  notes: String
  dependencies: [DependencyInput!]!
  extra: JSON
}

input DependencyInput {
  issueID: ID!
  dependsOnID: ID!
  type: String!
  createdAt: String
  createdBy: String
  metadata: String
}

---
fragment BeadFields on Bead {
  id
  title
  status
  priority
  issueType
  owner
  createdAt
  createdBy
  updatedAt
  labels
  parent
  description
  acceptance
  notes
  dependencies {
    issueID
    dependsOnID
    type
    createdAt
    createdBy
    metadata
  }
  extra
}

query GetBead($id: ID!) {
  ddxBead(id: $id) {
    ...BeadFields
  }
}

query ListBeads {
  ddxBeads {
    ...BeadFields
  }
}

mutation CreateBead($input: BeadInput!) {
  createEntity(input: $input) {
    ...BeadFields
  }
}

mutation UpdateBead($id: ID!, $expectedVersion: Int!, $input: BeadInput!) {
  updateEntity(id: $id, expectedVersion: $expectedVersion, input: $input) {
    ...BeadFields
  }
}

---
fragment ChangeEventFields on ChangeEvent {
  eventID
  beadID
  kind
  summary
  body
  actor
  timestamp
}

subscription ChangeEvents($projectID: ID!) {
  changeEvents(projectID: $projectID) {
    ...ChangeEventFields
  }
}
